Watchdog
Â¶
Python API library and shell utilities to monitor file system events.
Directory monitoring made easy with
Â¶
A cross-platform API.
A shell tool to run commands in response to directory changes.
Get started quickly with a simple example in
Quickstart
.
Easy installation
Â¶
You can use
pip
to install
watchdog
quickly and easily:
$ pip install watchdog
Need more help with installing? See
Installation
.

Contribute
Â¶
Found a bug in or want a feature added to
watchdog
?
You can fork the official
code repository
or file an issue ticket
at the
issue tracker
. You can also ask questions at the official
mailing list
. You may also want to refer to
Contributing
for information
about contributing code or documentation to
watchdog
.
